title: NPT RevCon Day 1: 구테흐스 '군비통제가 죽어가고 있다' — 핵탄두 증가 추세, NEW START 만료 후 최초 무제한 상태 경고
snippet: UN Secretary-General Guterres warned 'Arms control is dying' at the opening of the 11th NPT Review Conference. He noted for the first time since 1972 there are no binding limits on US and Russian nuclear arsenals following New START expiry in February 2026. Called for 'breathing new life' into the NPT. Warned nuclear threat compounded by AI and quantum computing.
tag_reason: 4/27 NPT RevCon 개막 당일 구테흐스 사무총장의 연설 내용. 이전 보고서에서 RevCon 개막 예고만 있었으나 실제 연설 내용은 신규.
